name: Frankenstein — Romantic Engravings
author: Storyplay
license: Public Domain — see assets-sources.md for per-image attribution.

art.notes: Theodor von Holst's 1831 frontispiece, Caspar David Friedrich landscapes, William Blake plates, 19th-century anatomical engravings.

description: Pairs Mary Shelley's text with Romantic-era painting and engraving. Holst's 1831 frontispiece for the Creature; Friedrich's Alpine landscapes for the Arctic and Mont Blanc; Blake's mythic figures for the Creature's philosophical monologues.
